package.name: armv7_zero_force_controller
package.description: Gravity-compensation (zero-force / free-drive) ros2_control controller for the armv7 arm. Computes the gravity torque G(q) from a KDL model of the robot_description (per-link mass + centre of mass optionally overridden by armv7_dyn_ident) and commands it on the effort interfaces, so the operator can move the arm by hand. Requires the drives in CiA-402 CST (torque) mode. Includes torque clamping, activation ramp-in, a velocity safety cutoff and an enable service.
package.author: TianFeiF
